channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: 3 officers convicted in Tyre Nichols fatal beating, 2 acquitted of civil rights charges
item.description: Three former Memphis officers were convicted Thursday of charges of witness tampering in the 2023 fatal beating of Tyre Nichols, and two were acquitted of federal civil rights violations in a death that sparked national protests and calls for broad changes in policing.
item.dc:creator: Megan Fayard, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump and the federal election case against him: Key passages from prosecutors' latest court filing
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump “laid the groundwork for his crimes” well before Election Day in 2020. He said “the details don’t matter” when told his election fraud claims would fail in court.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER and FARNOUSH AMIRI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Former Colorado county clerk Tina Peters sentenced to 9 years for voting data scheme
item.description: A judge ripped into a Colorado county clerk for her crimes and lies before sentencing her Thursday to nine years behind bars for a data-breach scheme spawned from the rampant false claims about voting machine fraud in the 2020 presidential race.
item.dc:creator: MEAD GRUVER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Motorized wheelchair stuffed with cocaine seized at Bush airport, CBP said
item.description: EL PASO, Texas (Border Report) -- Unusually large cushions on a motorized wheelchair piqued the interest of officers at George Bush Intercontinental Airport last month in Houston, U.S. Customs and Border Protection said. Their suspicions were right.
item.dc:creator: Fernie Ortiz, Fox 5

item.title: Country music star Garth Brooks accused of sexual assault by makeup artist
item.description: Garth Brooks, the country music superstar who gained fame in the 1990s with several hit songs, has been named in a lawsuit accusing him of raping a hair and makeup artist in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: Twin babies who died alongside their mother in Georgia are youngest-known Hurricane Helene victims
item.description: Obie Williams could hear babies crying and branches battering the windows when he answered his daughter’s daily phone call last week as Hurricane Helene tore through her rural Georgia town.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What's next after prosecutors reveal new evidence in Trump's 2020 election interference case
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Special counsel Jack Smith has provided a road map for how prosecutors hope to prove their case charging former President Donald Trump with an illegal scheme to overturn his 2020 election loss — if it ever gets to trial.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Hurricane Kirk strengthens into a Category 4 storm in the Atlantic
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Hurricane Kirk was a Category 4 major hurricane on Thursday, and waves from the system could cause life-threatening surf and rip current conditions this weekend along the U.S. East Coast as well as in Bermuda, the Greater Antilles and the Bahamas, forecasters said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: TikTok star 'Mr. Prada' arrested in connection to murder of beloved Louisiana therapist
item.description: A TikTok personality with over 8 million followers is in custody after being connected to a homicide investigation of a Baton Rouge therapist and former Catholic priest.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NYC accelerates school leadership change as investigations swirl around mayor’s indictment
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York City is speeding up its switch to a new schools chief as indicted Mayor Eric Adams faces mounting pressure to bring stability to a city government that has been roiled by searches, subpoenas and resignations.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden's student loan cancellation is free to move forward — for now — as a court order expires
item.description: President Joe Biden’s latest attempt at student loan cancellation is free to move ahead, at least temporarily, after a judge in Georgia sent a legal challenge to Missouri.
item.dc:creator: Collin Binkley, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Texas teen abducted from Dallas Mavericks NBA game shares what lured her from dad
item.description: Natalee Cramer, now 18, is speaking out for the first time since she was abducted from a Dallas Mavericks game and allegedly forced into sex trafficking in 2022.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: VIDEO: Shipping container slams into electrical pole during Hurricane Helene; death toll reaches 200
item.description: A shipping container slammed into an electrical pole while floating debris was split in half during extreme, rising water in Asheville, North Carolina last week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Port of Houston faces shutdown amid dockworkers strike threat. How it could affect your shopping
item.description: U.S. ports from Maine to Texas are closed due to a strike by the union representing about 45,000 dockworkers.
item.dc:creator: Mae Anderson And Anne D'Innocenzio, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 10,000 fentanyl pills seized at Nashville bus station
item.description: Officers found a large bundle wrapped in duct tape with 10,000 pills that contained fentanyl, according to police.
item.dc:creator: Brittney Baird, NewsNation

item.title: Wawa named No. 1 convenience store in consumer satisfaction survey
item.description: Analysts noted that many of the top-ranked chains specialized in ready-to-eat foods prepared in the stores' kitchens.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Yakubovsky, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump downplays troop injuries in 2020 missile strike: 'You mean because they had a headache?'
item.description: Trump was asked whether he should have responded more strongly to Iran after it launched missiles at U.S. forces stationed at a base in Iraq in 2020, leaving dozens with traumatic brain injuries.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Men accused of killing Jocelyn Nungaray believed to be Venezuelan gang members: search warrant
item.description: Search warrants reveal how investigators have looked into the social media accounts of the men accused of murdering 12-year-old Jocelyn Nungaray.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Latest: Harris campaigns in Wisconsin and Trump in Michigan in battle for 'blue wall' states
item.description: Democratic presidential candidate Kamala Harris is opening a two-day stay in Wisconsin and Michigan, and Republican candidate Donald Trump will be in Michigan on Thursday as the two candidates grapple for wins in the “blue wall” battleground states, which also include Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Meet Spot, the LAPD's new crimefighting robot dog
item.description: The futuristic four-legged machine, which boasts the size and agility of a 70-pound golden retriever, has been met with both fascination and concern.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, WGN 9

item.title: Explainer: How immigrants end up on ICE's non-detained docket
item.description: Recent reports that over 435,000 convicted criminals are on U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement's non-detained docket (NDD) -- meaning they are not detained by the agency while they await immigration proceedings -- has spurred much criticism and confusion.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, NewsNation

item.title: Hurricane Helene scrambles politics in 3 battleground states
item.description: The 500-mile-long path of destruction cut by Hurricane Helene has scrambled the politics of three battleground states that could determine control of the White House and Senate: North Carolina, Georgia and Florida.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: South Carolina grandparents killed by fallen tree during Helene are found hugging
item.description: A South Carolina couple were found hugging each other after a tree fell on their bedroom and killed them.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Costco now selling platinum bars and coins on website
item.description: Following the smash success of adding gold and silver bars and coins to its list of products, Costco has added a new precious metal to its stores: platinum.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: Costco now selling platinum bars and coins on website
item.description: Following the smash success of adding gold and silver bars and coins to its list of products, Costco has added a new precious metal to its stores: platinum.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Liz Cheney campaigns with Harris in Wisconsin while Trump holds a rally in Michigan
item.description: Liz Cheney is one of Donald Trump's fiercest Republican critics and now she's campaigning with Democrat Kamala Harris in Wisconsin.
item.dc:creator: Chris Megerian, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Vance-Walz debate: Parkland parent, school safety expert says one candidate closer to the answer
item.description: Ohio Sen. JD Vance and Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz have differing views on how to tackle gun violence, but a school safety expert says only one candidate is "closer to the answer.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cajun Navy activates in Hurricane Helene aftermath, says devastation comparable to Katrina
item.description: Volunteers from across the United States have deployed to the Appalachian region to answer the call for help after Hurricane Helene devastated rural areas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hurricane Kirk strengthens into a Category 3 storm in the Atlantic
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Hurricane Kirk strengthened Wednesday into a Category 3 storm in the Atlantic Ocean and was expected to grow rapidly into a major hurricane, forecasters said. There were no coastal watches or warnings in effect, and the storm system was not yet deemed a threat to land.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Alleged Diddy victim says cops won't turn over 2018 rape report
item.description: Attorney Ariel Mitchell-Kidd said she's "floored" and that "it's apparent that some type of cover-up is going on.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Fed agencies released noncitizens without ID into US, allowed them to board domestic flights: DHS OIG report
item.description: A new DHS Inspector General report finds CBP, ICE, and TSA allowed noncitizens without ID to enter the U.S. and board domestic flights.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Helene's flooding swept away 11 workers at a Tennessee factory. Now the state is investigating
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Tennessee state authorities said Wednesday they were investigating the company that owns a plastics factory where 11 workers were swept away by cataclysmic flooding unleashed by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN MATTISE and CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Shock of deadly floods is a reminder of Appalachia’s risk from violent storms in a warming climate
item.description: HENDERSONVILLE, N.C. (AP) — Hurricane Helene dumped trillions of gallons of water hundreds of miles inland, devastating communities nestled in mountains far from the threat of storm surge or sea level rise.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL PHILLIS and BRITTANY PETERSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: After employees swept away in Helene flooding, Tennessee factory under investigation
item.description: Several employees have accused the company of not letting them leave soon enough as flooding set in on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Keeling, Fox 5

item.title: Bank of America is having service issues and account access problems: Downdetector
item.description: A message on the Bank of America app states, “Accounts Temporarily Unavailable. Some accounts and/or balances are temporarily unavailable.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Euzarraga, NewsNation

item.title: Prosecutors say they may bring additional charges against New York City mayor and indict others
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Federal prosecutors said Wednesday they are pursuing “several related investigations” that could lead to additional corruption charges against New York City Mayor Eric Adams and indictments for people in his orbit.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: After Helene cuts roads, power, phones, Southerners stay in touch the old-fashioned way
item.description: In remote mountain areas, helicopters hoisted the stranded to safety while search crews waded through floodwaters and moved toppled trees so they could look door to door for survivors.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4
